Our Products

Baby Products

High-quality, certified baby products from a professional Chinese manufacturer. Each product undergoes rigorous quality control to ensure safety and compliance.

MOQ: 50

ASTM Certified Baby Stroller

Lightweight, foldable baby stroller with ASTM F833-23 certification. Premium aluminum frame with one-hand fold design. Suitable for babies 6-36 months. Export to US, Canada, EU with 247+ batches, zero return rate.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
ASTM F833-23 CPC EN 1888 ISO 9001
View Details
MOQ: 100

EN Certified Safety Gate

EN 1930:2012 certified baby safety gate with pressure mount installation. Auto-close door with double-locking mechanism. Fits doorways 75-100cm width. Ideal for stairs and room entrances.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
EN 1930 CPSC CE ASTM F1004
View Details
MOQ: 80

CPC Certified High Chair

CPC and ASTM F404 certified baby high chair with 7-position height adjustment and 3-position recline. Removable dishwasher-safe tray. Premium PP+metal construction. For babies 6-36 months.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
CPC ASTM F404 FDA EN 14988
View Details
MOQ: 60

Baby Bed Rail Safety Guard

Heightening reinforced baby bed rail with breathable mesh window. Prevents toddler falls during sleep. Adjustable length 120-200cm. EN 1930 and CPSC certified. Tool-free installation.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
EN 1930 CPSC ASTM F1004 CE
View Details
FAQs

Product Related Questions

What certifications do your baby products have?

Our baby products are certified with ASTM F833-23 (US standard for strollers), EN 1888-1:2018 (EU standard for strollers), EN 1930:2012 (EU standard for safety gates), ASTM F404-23 (US standard for high chairs), CPC (Children's Product Certificate), ISO 9001:2015 (Quality management system), and CE marking. All certifications are verifiable with test report numbers provided upon request.

What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for your baby products?

Our MOQ varies by product: Baby Stroller - 50 units, Safety Gate - 100 units, High Chair - 80 units, Bed Rail - 60 units. For startups and first-time orders, we can negotiate lower MOQs (as low as 30 units) with a small surcharge of 10-15%. Please contact us to discuss your specific needs.

How long is the lead time for sample and mass production?

Lead times: Sample production: 3-7 days (standard products), Custom sample: 7-10 days, Mass production: 15-25 days after sample approval, Rush orders: Available with 10-15% surcharge. We provide daily production updates via WhatsApp or Email, and can share photos and videos upon request.

View all FAQs
